commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes DashScope-compatible video submit and poll success responses from raw `response.json()` to `readProviderJsonResponse` so both JSON reads use the shared 16 MiB cap.

PR surface: Source +7. Total +7 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and `v2026.6.10` still use raw `response.json()` in both targeted DashScope success-body paths, and the PR body includes copied live output from a local HTTP-server proof for oversized JSON.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can update the provider HTTP test mock for the newly imported helper; maintainer acceptance of the 16 MiB compatibility tradeoff still gates final merge.

target.title: fix(video-generation): bound dashscope JSON response reads at 16 MiB
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`src/video-generation/dashscope-compatible.ts` has 2 unbounded `await response.json()` calls (task poll response, submit response). A hostile DashScope endpoint or proxy can return an oversized JSON body that exhausts process memory. The download path in the same file already uses `readResponseWithLimit` ŌĆö this brings the submit and poll paths into the same bound-read family.

## Changes

- `src/video-generation/dashscope-compatible.ts:202,269` ŌĆö replace 2 `(await response.json()) as DashscopeVideoGenerationResponse` calls with `readProviderJsonResponse<DashscopeVideoGenerationResponse>(response, "<label>")`. Labels: `"${providerLabel} video-generation task poll"`, `"${providerLabel} video generation"`.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed**: unbounded response.json() on 2 DashScope video-generation HTTP responses; after the fix reads are capped at 16 MiB.
- **Real environment tested**: real node:http server on 127.0.0.1 returning a JSON body exceeding 16 MiB (20 MiB) + negative control + happy path. Node v22.22.0.
- **Evidence after fix**:
  ```
  === dashscope video-generation JSON bounded reads (cap=16777216) ===

    PASS hostile body: overflow; bytesSent=20971748; aborted=true
    PASS negative control: small body parsed (task_status=SUCCEEDED)
    PASS happy path: valid JSON parsed (task_id=t-123)

  === All dashscope video-generation bounded-read assertions passed ===
  ```
- **What was not tested**: live DashScope API call; cross-platform Node differences.

## Out of scope

- Other `response.json()` sites in the codebase ŌĆö covered by separate Alix-007-style per-surface PRs.

## Risk

- **Very low**: swap to `readProviderJsonResponse` ŌĆö same error shape, 16 MiB default cap. The download path in the same file already uses `readResponseWithLimit` (same family). Existing behavior for normal-sized responses (< 1 MiB for video task payloads) is unchanged.

## Diff stats

```
1 file changed, 9 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)
```
target.author: wangmiao0668000666
